value="<div align="left" style="padding-top: 10px; padding-left: 10px;">void accept(visitor: Visitor) {<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; // visit element<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; if (visitor.shouldVisit(this)):<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; visitor.accept(this);<br><br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; if (visitor.shouldAbort()):<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; return;<br><br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; // visit children elements<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; foreach (child in children) {<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; child.accept(visitor);<br><br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; if (visitor.shouldAbort()):<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; break;<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; }<br>&nbsp; &nbsp; }</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="248" width="218" x="200" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ivYUXF_oSt_E0MDVk3Yb-31" edge="1" parent="1"
